case.title: S. S. KRESGE CO. v. BOWERS

opinion.h4: S. S. KRESGE CO. v. BOWERS, (1961)
S. S. KRESGE CO. v. BOWERS, TAX COMMISSIONER OF OHIO. APPEAL FORM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 534. Decided February 27, 1961.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Carlton S. Dargusch and Carlton S. Dargusch, Jr. for appellant.
Mark McElroy, Attorney General of Ohio, and Joseph D. Karam and Robert J. Kosydar, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
